name: Chocolate Cherry Bars
recipeIngredient: Pillsbury Plus Devil's Food Cake Mix (1 pkg)
Cherry fruit pie filling (21 oz can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 15x10 inch jelly roll pan or a 13x9 inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine all bar ingredients; stir until well mixed.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake for 20-30 minutes in the jelly roll pan or 25-35 minutes in the 13x9 inch pan, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. In a small saucepan, combine sugar and margarine (or butter). Heat over low heat until boiling, then boil for 1 minute while stirring constantly.
7. Remove from heat and stir in chocolate chips until smooth.
8. Pour the warm sauce over the baked bars.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
10. Garnish as desired. Approximately 36 bars result.
